subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God, who art drawn by the divine fragrances! The honoured Tiraz is wandering in the realm of Shiraz and in his native [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله المنجذبه بنفحات الله جناب طراز سرگشته اقلیم شیراز است و در موطن
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @praise and encouragement, @high station of the true believer, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
